hotelImages.caption: Baiturrahman Grand Mosque - 4.79 km from property

address.address1: Jl. Teuku Nyak Arief, Lamgugob, Lamnyong, Kota Banda Aceh, Aceh 23112

nearbyPlaces.name: RF Dental Clinic& Lab -1 praktek dokter Gigi

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. This 5-star property is packed with in-house facilities to improve the quality and joy of your stay.

details.title: Infant 1-4 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 5-6 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

minAge: Minimum age of guests is: 1 year(s).
adult: Guests 7 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

features.featureName: Hot water linen and laundry washing
Pets may not be left unattended

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Semua hal di hotel ini sudah bagus, terutama di ongkos yang serendah ini.

Tapi, 3 hal yang sangat kekurangan; lantai kamar yang pembersihannya tidak bagus, AC yang bermasalah karena tidak dirawat dan kamar mandi yang sangat sempit dan tidak layak pakai.
comments.reviewTitle: Pembersihan Lantai, AC dan Kamar Mandi

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Macam zaman dahulu Kala. Takda WiFi.selimut kena Minta.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Hotel akun scam udah mesen gak bisa check in
comments.reviewTitle: Hotel scam udah mesen gak bisa check in
